title: dianthus costae
intro: Dianthus costae, also known as the Alpine Pink, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family native to the mountains of Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dianthus costae include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues due to its antispasmodic and carminative effects. Dianthus costae can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health concerns.
